ddls:
CREATE TABLE "colonies" (
  "colony_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each colony */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Name of the destination or colony */,
  "distance_ly" REAL /* Distance of the colony from the central hub in light years (LY) */,
  "government_stability" INTEGER /* Government stability index (1-10, where 10 is most stable) */,
  "economic_health" INTEGER /* Economic health index (1-10, where 10 is most healthy) */,
  "tech_level" INTEGER /* Technological level (1-10, where 10 is most advanced) */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population size of the colony */,
  "production" TEXT /* Annual economic production in megacredits (MCr) */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the colony was founded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the colony is located in */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the colony is part of */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("colony_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "colony_id" INTEGER /* ID of the colony the indicator is associated with */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the economic data */,
  "gdp_growth" REAL /* GDP growth rate in percentage */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate in percentage */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in percentage */,
  "trade_balance" REAL /* Trade balance in megacredits (MCr) */,
  "investment_flow" REAL /* Net investment flow in megacredits (MCr) */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita in megacredits (MCr) */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in megacredits (MCr) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_colony_id FOREIGN KEY ("colony_id") REFERENCES colonies ("colony_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction record */,
  "colony_id" INTEGER /* ID of the colony the prediction is associated with */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of indicator being predicted (e.g. GDP growth, inflation rate) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the predicted data */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value of the indicator */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_colony_id FOREIGN KEY ("colony_id") REFERENCES colonies ("colony_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. executive, analyst, field operative) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g. view, edit, delete) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of the permission (e.g. read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_routes" (
  "trade_route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade route record */,
  "colony1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first colony in the trade route */,
  "colony2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second colony in the trade route */,
  "trade_route_type" TEXT /* Type of trade route (e.g. import, export) */,
  "distance_ly" REAL /* Distance of the trade route in light years (LY) */,
  "travel_time" REAL /* Travel time of the trade route in days */,
  "trade_volume" REAL /* Volume of trade on the route */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_routes_colony2_id FOREIGN KEY ("colony2_id") REFERENCES colonies ("colony_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_routes_colony1_id FOREIGN KEY ("colony1_id") REFERENCES colonies ("colony_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message record */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the message */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
